solutions.title: Charging Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Comprehensive EV charging solutions for every scenario
solutions.homeDesc: Smart wallbox solutions with APP control, Dynamic Load Balance, and government subsidy eligibility (KfW, UK EVHS).
solutions.commercialDesc: OCPP-enabled stations with MID certified meters, RFID authentication, and cashless payment for parking lots and workplaces.
solutions.publicDesc: High-power DC fast chargers up to 720KW with split design, liquid cooling, and intelligent power distribution for highway and fleet charging.

certs.patentsDesc: Including invention patents and software copyrights
certs.subsidiesDesc: KfW eligible (Germany) and UK EVHS approved products

cloud.title: Cloud Platform & APP
cloud.subtitle: Smart charging management at your fingertips
cloud.cmsDesc: A central system for charger operators to manage charge points and monitor charging services. Status monitor, charger record, price management, firmware upgrade, remote diagnose, and load balance.
cloud.appDesc: Connects EV drivers with charging stations. Location search, charging monitor, and payment settlement — all in one app.

about.title: About Yinglit
about.subtitle: Powering e-Mobility since 2017
about.story: Founded in 2017, Yinglit (Shenzhen Yingli Technology) is a total-solution supplier of EV charging stations and cloud management systems. With a top R&D team and rich experience in international protocols (OCPP 1.6J+), we serve operators across 25+ countries.
about.innovationDesc: Modular designed products facilitate customization. Every year we upgrade our products and develop new technology (Bluetooth Mesh, ISO15118, OCPP 1.6J+).
about.capacityDesc: Besides our own factory, we cooperate with professional subcontract factories for flexible capacity and competitive pricing.
about.globalDesc: Products exported to 25+ countries including Norway, Italy, UK, Germany, Korea, Sweden, Poland, Australia, Romania, and Thailand.
